parsed.fixed_xml: <ITEM>In der Hoch-Obrigkeitl. Buchtruckerey zu Bern und folgende Bücher in gar geringem Preis zu haben, als: 1. <BIBL><AUTHOR>J. H Ringieri</AUTHOR> <TITLE>CX. Conciones de Coena Dominic.</TITLE> <VOLUME>3. Vol.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>4to.</FORMAT> <PLACE>Bern.</PLACE> <YEAR>1680</YEAR>. das Exemplar in albo achthalben <PRIZE>bz.</PRIZE></BIBL> 2. <BIBL><AUTHOR>Rissenii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Summa Theolog.</TITLE> <FORMAT>in 8vo.</FORMAT> <PLACE>Bern.</PLACE> <YEAR>1703</YEAR>. <PRIZE>10. Batzen,</PRIZE> und auff Schreib-papier <PRIZE>14. Batzen.</PRIZE></BIBL> 3. <BIBL><AUTHOR>Rodolphi</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Compend. Theol. Christ</TITLE> <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> <PLACE>Bern</PLACE><YEAR>1713</YEAR>. <PRIZE>8 Batzen.</PRIZE></BIBL> 4. <BIBL><AUTHOR>Altmanns</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Catechetischer Leuchter und Rauchwerck, d. i. Erklärung und Gebätt über den Heydelbergischen Catechismum,</TITLE> <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> <PLACE>Bern,</PLACE> <YEAR>1711</YEAR>. mit dem Kupffer-Blatt haltet <PRIZE>15. und ein halben Bogen,</PRIZE> <PRIZE>5. Batzen.</PRIZE></BIBL> 5. <BIBL><TITLE>Biblia Piscatoris</TITLE> <FORMAT>in 4to.</FORMAT> <PLACE>Bern,</PLACE> <PRIZE>15. Batzen.</PRIZE></BIBL> 6. <BIBL><AUTHOR>Seelmatters</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Ewig-vest-bestehender Berg Zion, oder: der vest-gegrundete unüberwindliche Gnaden-Stand der Kinderen GOttes,</TITLE> <NOTE>gründlich vorgestellt über die Worte des 125. Pfalms 9. 1.</NOTE> <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> <PLACE>Bern.</PLACE> <YEAR>1704</YEAR>. <PRIZE>5. Batzen.</PRIZE></BIBL></ITEM>
parsed.explanation: I fixed malformed XML and obvious OCR/tagging faults while preserving the original structure and wording as much as possible. Main fixes: (1) corrected broken Unicode/OCR characters (e.g., Bücher, Preis, über), (2) corrected typo in TITLE 'Ccena' -> 'Coena', (3) corrected 'Eremplar' -> 'Exemplar', (4) fixed TITLE 'Carechetischer' -> 'Catechetischer', (5) fixed 'Leücher' -> 'Leuchter', (6) fixed 'Erklärung' and 'Gebätt', (7) fixed 'Kupffer-Btatt' -> 'Kupffer-Blatt', (8) fixed PLACE 'Rein' -> 'Bern' (contextual correction), (9) removed stray non-XML symbols (√† artifacts), (10) fixed mismatched closing tag </PRICE> to </PRIZE>, (11) wrapped previously untagged descriptive clause in item 6 inside <NOTE>...</NOTE>, (12) normalized spacing around hyphenated words in TITLE item 6, (13) retained multiple <PRIZE> tags where pricing variants are listed, and (14) ensured the final XML is well-formed with properly nested/closed tags.
